title: gongora boracayanensis
intro: Gongora boracayanensis, also known as the Boracayan's gongora, is a species of orchid found in the tropical forests of the Philippines. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Gongora boracayanensis include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Gongora boracayanensis is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for herbal remedies, with some studies suggesting its extracts may have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties.
